meta.title: D&D Yhtiöt Oy — Property Maintenance & Construction
meta.description: Professional property maintenance and quality construction throughout Finland — from one trusted partner.

hero.label: Property Maintenance & Construction
hero.sub: Professional property maintenance and quality construction throughout Finland — from one trusted partner.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: WHAT WE DO
services.card1Desc: Regular property upkeep, building services, cleaning and yard maintenance. We keep your property in top shape year-round.
services.card2Desc: New builds and extensions from start to finish. Our experienced team masters all challenges across every phase.
services.card3Desc: Kitchen, bathroom and apartment renovations. We transform old spaces into functional, modern living environments.
services.card4Desc: Design and construction of driveways, fencing and landscaping. We create outdoor spaces you can be proud of.
services.card5Desc: Round-the-clock response to urgent property issues. We're on site fast when you need help the most.
services.card6Title: Can't find the right fit? Contact us — we tailor it.

whyUs.tagline: Construction is full of easy promises — our difference is that we keep them.
whyUs.point1Desc: Every project is executed with full professional skill from start to finish. We never compromise on quality — we do things right the first time.
whyUs.point2Title: One point of contact, full accountability
whyUs.point2Desc: You don't need to coordinate ten suppliers. You get one responsible contact who manages the whole picture on your behalf.
whyUs.point3Desc: Our quote is clear and binding. We invoice what was agreed — no more, no less.
whyUs.point4Desc: Two decades of projects across Finland has taught us everything that can be encountered in property services.

testimonials.label: Clients
testimonials.title: WHAT THEY SAY
testimonials.t1Text: D&D Yhtiöt completed our entire property renovation on schedule and within the agreed budget. No extra invoices, no surprises — exactly as it should be.
testimonials.t2Text: I've been using D&D for five years for our office property maintenance. The collaboration is smooth, quality consistent and pricing fair. Highly recommended.

contact.title: READY TO START?
contact.sub: Request a free quote. We respond within 24 hours.
contact.successMessage: Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Professional property maintenance and construction — reliably, on time, at the agreed price.
